behaviors.behavior: 3 concurrent parallel iterates drain serially: curated-union + churn-regenerate + JSONL-union all resolve, no markers, run's event survives
campaign of 3 sub-iterates drains serially: status.json projects all-complete from union'd events + curated-union, no cascade
final origin/main carries all N curated bullets + regenerated churn + union'd JSONL with no conflict markers

surface_verification.justification: Test-only addition (a new shared/tests integration test) — no application surface, no production-code change. The behavior it proves IS the verification: real-git serial-drain of N parallel/campaign branches, asserting the three cascade artifact-classes resolve together. Runs in the shared/tests F0 suite + CI (not slow).
